scene_title: Dragão colossal e besta de sete cabeças
narrative_beat: Wide of colossal P&B dragon coiled around stone throne, golden-crimson seven-headed beast enthroned, silhouetted worshipping crowd below

style_reference.textual_description: dark cinematic chiaroscuro, Caravaggio-inspired, foreground in rich warm tones (crimson, amber, gold) with background in desaturated black-and-white, film grain, candlelight, floating orange embers

subject.primary: a colossal desaturated dragon coiled around a massive stone throne
subject.focal_point: a seven-headed beast in rich crimson and gold sitting on the throne, each head slightly different
subject.secondary: A tiny silhouetted worshipping crowd kneeling at the base. Floating embers in storm sky.

composition.rule: rule of thirds with throne at center
composition.foreground: seven-headed beast in rich crimson and gold
composition.background: desaturated black-and-white dragon, throne and crowd

lighting.key_light: divine storm light from above on throne

style.post_processing: halation, crushed blacks, amber highlights, anamorphic lens flares
style.texture_detail: 35mm film grain, dust particles, floating orange embers

symbolism.primary: Revelation 13:4 — who can war against it

negative_as_positive: clean frame without visible text or watermarks
photorealistic documentary cinematography, not illustrated or cartoon
analog film photography aesthetic, no digital art flatness
muted desaturated background palette, warm saturated foreground only

multimodal_inputs.instruction: Transfer color palette, lighting, grain, atmosphere only. Do not copy composition.
